notes: External smart-contract audit (R-01) not yet engaged. BrainEscrow is the only funds-custodying contract and is Base Sepolia testnet-only until this clears. Mainnet escrow boot is fenced by composition/escrow-audit-gate.ts (which ALSO requires this file's status to be 'approved'), and check-audit-status.mjs forbids marking 'approved' without an auditor, an audited 40-hex commit, a report reference, and zero unresolved critical/high findings. Approval ALSO binds to the audited build (P1): compiler (solc_version/optimizer_enabled/optimizer_runs/evm_version), contract_source_tree_sha256, and creation/runtime_bytecode_sha256, plus approved_chain_ids. Populate these from `node scripts/verify-audited-build.mjs` (run after `forge build`) using the auditor's final report; that tool also re-verifies them in CI so a contract or toolchain change after the audited commit fails the build. Update this file ONLY from the auditor's final report.
